title: Senior Teacher - SSC Tube South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - SSC Tube South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the SSC Tube South Asia Partners family as a Senior Teacher in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SSC Tube South Asia Partners:
SSC Tube South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube South Asia Partners!
